title: Manticore
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f364c8f987033ecff2629863fc5afbdfcbcb3c3a.png)
Made by MCreator.
# Disclaimer
I'm Japanese, so I'm sorry if my English is wrong.
Also, I don't have the time, so I can't provide detailed support.

# About

This mod adds new fantasy mobs.
All mobs come from real lore, but with a Minecrafty twist!

# Mobs

## Kobold
![Kobold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f220c96912338049eb53c2209b7297cedf7c5b.png)

A piglin-like mob that lives in the Flower Forest.

If you give it a golden apple and some kind of item, it has a chance of duplicating it.

However, it can also be stolen...

In the future, they will live in villages.

## Centaur
![Centaur](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e875588766c449624e3ca79b4ae020bc5b30978.png)

An half-illager, half-beast that lives on the mountaintop.

They attack dashingly and rush through quickly.

In the future they will drop items.
